author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(react-instantsearch-core): allow widgets to set their $$widgetType (algolia/react-instantsearch#3472)
body:
* feat(react-instantsearch-core): allow widgets to set their $$widgetType

This is is used in metadata to distinguish between a built-in component and a custom one.

This commit only shows how it could be implemented in HierarchicalMenu, not yet the tests / other widgets to open the conversation

FX-917

* default?

* renames

* implement $$type too

* implementation

* no double initializer

* fix regex

* fix test

* Apply suggestions from code review

Co-authored-by: Dhaya <154633+dhayab@users.noreply.github.com>

* size

* Update packages/react-instantsearch-dom/src/widgets/Snippet.js

Co-authored-by: Dhaya <154633+dhayab@users.noreply.github.com>

* lint

* cool widgets need to be tested too

Co-authored-by: Dhaya <154633+dhayab@users.noreply.github.com>
